details: The agent correctly navigated to both URLs. For the first URL (httpbin.org/status/404), it properly reported the navigation failure with the specific error 'net::ERR_HTTP_RESPONSE_CODE_FAILURE'. For the second URL (httpbin.org/html), it successfully navigated and accurately reported the page content as a Herman Melville Moby-Dick excerpt, confirmed by the snapshot showing the correct heading and passage. Both steps were completed correctly.
